productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Navy Blue & Grey Striped T-shirt
description: Style NoteAn effortless way to tap into this summer's hottest colour trends, this polo T-shirt form arrow is a versatile piece. We suggest that you style this with classic, fitted denims and a denim jacket one tone lighter than your jeans. Wear this with any kind of casual shoes.Product DetailsNavy blue and grey striped polo T-shirt with a grey spread collar, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two buttoned placket, embroidery on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonHand or machine washDelicate machine washUse mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroiderySize and FitRegularThe model (height 6' and waist 18") is wearing a size M
